Inter Milan vs AS Roma — Serie A, 5 April 2026

---
Inter Milan (Coach: Cristian Chivu)

Starters: Yann Sommer; Denzel Dumfries, Manuel Akanji, Francesco Acerbi, Alessandro Bastoni,
Federico Dimarco; Hakan Calhanoglu, Nicolò Barella, Piotr Zielinski; Marcus Thuram, Lautaro Martínez

Substitutes: Josep Martínez, Raffaele Di Gennaro, Matteo Darmian, Stefan de Vrij, Matteo Cocchi,
Andy Alune Diouf, Petar Sucic, Davide Frattesi, Henrikh Mkhitaryan, Luis Henrique, Francesco Pio
Esposito, Ange-Yoan Bonny

---
AS Roma (Coach: Gian Piero Gasperini)

Starters: Mile Svilar; Zeki Çelik, Gianluca Mancini, Evan N'Dicka, Devyne Rensch, Mario Hermoso;
Bryan Cristante, Niccolò Pisilli, Lorenzo Pellegrini; Matías Soulé, Donyell Malen

Substitutes: Pierluigi Gollini, Giorgio De Marzi, Daniele Ghilardi, Jan Ziółkowski, Konstantinos
Tsimikas, Angeliño, Neil El Aynaoui, Lorenzo Venturino, Robinio Vaz, Bryan Zaragoza, Stephan El
Shaarawy
